prompt: A dynamic action shot of a skateboarder mid-flip in an urban skate park, graffiti-covered walls in the background.
prompt_refined: A photorealistic, high-energy action shot of a skateboarder suspended in mid-air during a flip trick, over a concrete ramp in a gritty urban skate park. The skateboard is visible below their feet. In the immediate background, vibrant, layered graffiti art adorns extensive concrete walls, stretching across the frame. Captured with a dynamic wide-angle lens from a low perspective, under natural daylight.
objects: Extensive concrete walls (in the immediate background, stretching across the frame)
